summary: Session 2 (final) closed Set 082 with UAT, critique, and release prep. The per-set UAT checklist was authored to the Set 078-081 bar (literal copy-pasteable actions; every quoted string re-grounded against current source; fresh suite counts quoted per walk: Set 082 grep 7/7, marker matrix 4/4, cold-start snapshot 2/2, full Layer-2 1270/0, tsc clean) with one honest documented adaptation: both real Build entry points are structure-only since Set 060, so the spec's '001-sample-feature spec.md' assertion is pinned by the golden-snapshot suite and the operator walks the step-3 session-set prompt's worked example (same shared renderSpec writer) instead. Operator walked 2026-07-06: all 5 functional items PASS across 3 walks (Full cold-start Build: tier marker only, no verification-mode file; Full prompt exemplar omits the line; Lightweight cold-start Build: both markers, exact pre-082 line; Full-over-Lightweight re-Build preserves the prior marker). Required path-aware critique ran via pull_critique (google/gemini-2.5-pro VERIFIED, 0 findings; openai/gpt-5.4 one Major: docs/concepts/tier-model.md line 51 still claimed 'required tier + verificationMode'). Adjudication: accepted-and-fixed in-session (line now scopes verificationMode to Lightweight; repo-wide echo sweep found no other live-doc drift); artifact kept raw/pre-fix per L-070-1. Release prep: extension 0.38.0 (package.json/package-lock), CHANGELOG 0.38.0 entry, repository-reference row + version walk honest about pending publish (L-078-1). Routed gate on the session diff: REQUIRED (blast-radius, multi-module, breadth, build-config); cross-provider verification on gpt-5-4: R1 format-noncompliant bare verdict (saved raw), R2 wording-compliance re-run (max_tier=3 per L-064-7) VERIFIED. Publish (tag vsix-v0.38.0) follows green Test + operator authorization; the repository-reference row flips to Published with run links at that point.
